checklist: Android Expo Go opens the Design Lab screen

operatorNote: คุณนนท์ accepted the UI direction as simple, functional, and ready for Phase 3. Device feedback found RecordListItem trailing labels falling outside the right edge; the primitive was repaired before closeout.
